description: live.com is a Microsoft-owned consumer account/domain family associated with Microsoft accounts and services such as Outlook.com and OneDrive. The developer materials surfaced for live.com route to Microsoft Learn and Microsoft Graph documentation rather than exposing programmatic interfaces hosted on live.com itself.
summary: No public developer integration surfaces were found on live.com itself. The domain mainly fronts Microsoft Learn and consumer Microsoft account/OneDrive properties, while the documented APIs for live.com users belong to other domains such as graph.microsoft.com, not live.com.
